artist: Presidents of the United States of America
era: 1993-present (with hiatuses). Alt Rock / Alt Pop-Rock. E=6 -- melodic, comedic, brilliantly strange, inexplicably catchy. Eastlake. Columbia.
associated_musicians: Chris Ballew solo work as Caspar Babypants

instruments.basitar: 2 bass strings on guitar body/neck. Built by Ballew. Low-mid frequency hybrid: bass + guitar simultaneously.
instruments.guitbass: 3-string guitar. Melody and upper-mid. Complements basitar. Dederer's instrument.
instruments.note: Modified instruments are not gimmicks -- engineering solutions to specific sonic requirements.

theory_nodes.concept: Modified instrument philosophy: basitar (2 bass strings, guitar neck) + guitbass (3-string guitar). Both instruments built to solve specific tonal problems. DIY engineering tradition. The sound you need doesn't exist? Build it.
theory_nodes.description: PUSA's custom instruments and their sonic logic.

theory_nodes.concept: Comedy as aesthetic resistance: in a grunge landscape dominated by angst, PUSA wrote hits about peaches, cats, and bogs. The humor was not accidental -- it was the countercultural move in a scene that had elevated seriousness to dogma.
theory_nodes.description: PUSA's comedy as genuine aesthetic position, not commercial calculation.

theory_nodes.concept: Jason Finn dual membership: Love Battery (221, psychedelic heavy rock, Sub Pop) + PUSA (238, alt-pop comedy, Columbia). Same drummer, 17 degrees apart in the engine. The cross-reference closes at 238.
theory_nodes.description: The Love Battery-PUSA engine connection completing.

cross_references.relationship: Jason Finn connection. Love Battery (psychedelic, Sub Pop, U-District) and PUSA (alt-pop, Columbia, Eastlake). Same drummer; opposite sonic worlds. 17 degrees between them.
E=7 to E=6. Post-Grunge to Alt Rock. Grief to peaches. Capitol Hill to Eastlake. The contrast is the point.
Columbia Records appears again at 240. Both signed to the same label; different eras, different sounds.

sps_pair.pairing_note: Coho aggressive male spawning chaos (E=6) + PUSA alt-pop energetic weirdness (E=6). Both are energetic, non-serious in conventional sense, full of physical noise and activity. E=6+6=12 equilibrium.

milestones: Jason Finn cross-reference completes (Love Battery 221 to PUSA 238)
